subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-06-10
subcodes.first_line: The Blessed Beauty did not make any more public speeches after leaving Baghdad and Adrianople
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمال مبارک بعد از دارالسلام و ادرنه در محفل عمومی نطق نفرمودند
